case_title: DAVID CHAN VS. KATE ABEENE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ABEENE, KATE WHITE, DAVID STONE, CHRISTOPHER BENNETT, DAVID
